meanings.definition: the act of protecting against disease by introducing a vaccine into the body to induce immunity
examples: doctors examined the recruits but nurses did the inoculating

meanings.definition: introduce an idea or attitude into the mind of
examples: My teachers inoculated me with their beliefs

meanings.definition: perform vaccinations or produce immunity in by inoculation
examples: The nurse vaccinated the children in the school

meanings.definition: impregnate with the virus or germ of a disease in order to render immune
